senses.gloss: to hope for, to look forward to, to request, to wish
to meditate, to think over, to ponder, to reflect

examples.text: الْتَّأَمُّلُ هُوَ فَنُّ تَهْدِئَةِ الْعَقْلِ لِسَمَاعِ هَمْسَاتِ الْرُّوحِ.
examples.english: Meditation is the art of silencing the mind to hear the whispers of the soul.
